message.content:
@startuml
actor Professor
participant "tela principal" as TelaPrincipal
control StudentController
entity StudentEntity

Professor -> TelaPrincipal : visualizar a lista de alunos
TelaPrincipal -> StudentController : requisitar lista de alunos
StudentController -> StudentEntity : buscar por alunos
activate StudentEntity
return lista de alunos
deactivate StudentEntity
TelaPrincipal <-- StudentController : responder com a lista de alunos
Professor <- - TelaPrincipal : exibir lista de alunos
@enduml
